ArgonTest.Name: Class override trait method
ArgonTest.InputSource:
import Ar._
trait MyTrait <: Any
public virtual proc self.say_hello(): () do puts ''Hello'' end
end
class MyClass <: MyTrait
public new() end
public override proc self.say_hello(): () do puts ''Moo'' end end
proc main(): () do val obj: MyTrait = MyClass.new() obj.say_hello() end
